# `xterm-input` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/xterm-input.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Enable Bracketed Paste (`xterm.bracketed_paste.enable`)

Paste payload is aggregated between start and end markers.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 2004 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/bracketed_paste_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/bracketed_paste_enable.seq)

## Disable Bracketed Paste (`xterm.bracketed_paste.disable`)

Turns off bracketed paste so pasted text is no longer wrapped in markers.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 2004 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/bracketed_paste_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/bracketed_paste_disable.seq)

## Bracketed Paste Start (`xterm.bracketed_paste.start`)

Internal delimiter; public event is the aggregated paste payload.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Bracketed Paste End (`xterm.bracketed_paste.end`)

Internal delimiter; public event is the aggregated paste payload.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Enable Focus Events (`xterm.focus.enable`)

Enables focus reporting so the terminal sends events when it gains or loses focus.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1004 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/focus_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/focus_enable.seq)

## Disable Focus Events (`xterm.focus.disable`)

Disables focus reporting so focus changes are no longer reported.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1004 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/focus_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/focus_disable.seq)

## Focus Gained (`xterm.focus.gained`)

Reports that the terminal window has gained keyboard focus.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Focus Lost (`xterm.focus.lost`)

Reports that the terminal window has lost keyboard focus.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Enable SGR Mouse Encoding (`xterm.mouse.sgr.enable`)

Requires an event-mode mouse enable entry for full reporting.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1006 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sgr_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sgr_mouse_enable.seq)

## Enable X10 Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.x10.enable`)

Legacy coordinate encoding is preserved but not preferred for new applications.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 9 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/x10_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/x10_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable X10 Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.x10.disable`)

Turns off X10 mouse reporting.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 9 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/x10_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/x10_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable Normal Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.normal.enable`)

Reports button press and release events.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1000 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/normal_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/normal_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable Normal Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.normal.disable`)

Turns off normal (button-press and release) mouse reporting.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1000 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/normal_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/normal_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable Button-Event Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.button_event.enable`)

Reports press, release, and button drag events.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1002 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/button_event_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/button_event_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable Button-Event Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.button_event.disable`)

Turns off button-event mouse reporting (motion while a button is held).

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1002 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/button_event_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/button_event_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable Any-Event Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.any_event.enable`)

Reports press, release, drag, and pointer motion events.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1003 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/any_event_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/any_event_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable Any-Event Mouse Reporting (`xterm.mouse.any_event.disable`)

Turns off any-event mouse reporting (all pointer motion).

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1003 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/any_event_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/any_event_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable UTF-8 Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.utf8.enable`)

Legacy UTF-8 coordinate encoding is retained for completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1005 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/utf8_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/utf8_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable UTF-8 Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.utf8.disable`)

Turns off UTF-8 mouse coordinate encoding.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1005 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/utf8_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/utf8_mouse_disable.seq)

## Disable SGR Mouse Encoding (`xterm.mouse.sgr.disable`)

Turns off SGR mouse coordinate encoding.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1006 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sgr_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sgr_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable urxvt Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.urxvt.enable`)

Uses CSI button ; column ; row M without the SGR private marker.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1015 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/urxvt_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/urxvt_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable urxvt Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.urxvt.disable`)

Turns off urxvt mouse coordinate encoding.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1015 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/urxvt_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/urxvt_mouse_disable.seq)

## Enable SGR Pixel Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.sgr_pixels.enable`)

Reports mouse coordinates in pixels using the SGR mouse syntax family.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1016 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sgr_pixel_mouse_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sgr_pixel_mouse_enable.seq)

## Disable SGR Pixel Mouse Coordinates (`xterm.mouse.sgr_pixels.disable`)

Turns off SGR pixel-precise mouse coordinate encoding.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1016 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sgr_pixel_mouse_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sgr_pixel_mouse_disable.seq)

## SGR Mouse Press (`xterm.mouse.sgr.press`)

Columns and rows are reported in protocol coordinate space.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Mouse Shift Middle Press (`xterm.mouse.sgr.shift_middle`)

Covers middle-button press plus the SGR shift modifier bit.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Pixel Mouse Press (`xterm.mouse.sgr.pixel_press`)

Adds pixel coordinates to the normal SGR mouse report fields.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## X10 Mouse Press (`xterm.mouse.x10.press`)

Legacy three-byte reports are decoded when coordinates fit printable bytes.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Mouse Release (`xterm.mouse.sgr.release`)

Release uses lowercase final byte `m` in SGR mode.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Mouse Drag (`xterm.mouse.sgr.drag`)

Button-event and any-event modes report drag by adding 32 to the button code.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Mouse Move (`xterm.mouse.sgr.move`)

Any-event mode reports motion with the motion bit and no active button.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## SGR Mouse Wheel (`xterm.mouse.sgr.wheel`)

Wheel reports use press form; xterm does not report wheel releases.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## urxvt Mouse Press (`xterm.mouse.urxvt.press`)

Decoded through the shared mouse event model.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

Edge fixture for the normal-tracking legacy release code at the origin.

- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

Edge fixture for UTF-8 encoded legacy coordinates above the ASCII range.

Covers wheel reporting with shift, alt, control, and high column value.
